titleStmt.title: SII 41.38: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 38. (A.R. No. 37 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the rock to the right of the way up to the hill in Perumukkal.

summary.p: Records a list of gifts of cows, and sheep for perpetual and sandhi lamps in the 16th, 43rd and 45th Years of the king, respectively by Rājēntirachōḻa-brammarāyar, Kiḍāraṅkoṇḍa-chōḻa-Milāḍarāyan and Araichūr-uḍaiyān Vēḷān Tiruvaraṅkamuḍaiyān, and Nuḷampuḻān Āṉai-choṭṭaiyāḻvān Chēvūr-nāṭṭuvēḷān.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkaccayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara
Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavarnilaikeṭa villavar kulai tara Ēnaimannavar
Iriyaluṟṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittuntanicakkara naṭātti vīrasimkāsaṉattu puvanamuḻutumu
ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun taruḷiya kovirācakecari parmarāna tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ siri
kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku Iyāṇṭu patināṟāvatil Oymānāṭāna vicaiyarāce
ntira vaḷanāṭṭup perumukkil tirumalaittiruvānmiśuvaramuṭaiya mātevaṟku Irājentira coḻa
brammadharāyar viṭṭa tirununtāviḷakku Onṟināṟ cāvāmūvāpacu muppatum Ittevaṟku yāṇṭu
nāṟpattumunṟāvatu coḻamaṇṭalattu paṇṭāḻacceri Uṭaiyān veḷān tirucciṟṟa
mpala muṭaiyāṉāna kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻamilāṭarāyan It tiruvānmiśuramuṭaiya
māhā tevaṟku viṭṭa tirununtāviḷak konṟināṟ cāvāmuvāp pacu muppatum perumpantūr nā
ṭṭu Araicūruṭaiyān veḷān tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ittevaṟku viṭṭa tirununtā viḷakku
Onṟināṟ cāvāmuvāp pacu muppatum śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
nāṟpattañcāvatil tirumalait tiruvānmiśuramuṭaiya mātevaṟku kiṭaṅkilil Araiyan
Anapanāyakan viṭṭa cantiviḷakku Onṟināṟ cāvāmuvāpperāṭu panniraṇṭum śrīkulottuṅka
coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattañcāvatu cevūr nāṭṭu nuḷampūr nuḷampuḻān Āṉai coṭṭaiyāḻvānāna ce
vūr nāṭṭuveḷān Ittirumalait tiruvānmiśurammuṭaiya mātevaṟku viṭṭa cantiviḷakku Onṟināṟ cāvāmuvā
p perāṭu panniraṇṭum Iccanti viḷakkiraṇṭum tirununtā viḷakku munṟum Ivai kaikkoṇṭu cantirātit
tavaṟ celuttak kaṭavomānom Ikkoyiliṟ civappirāmaṇarom Āttiraiyan tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭan
Ampalaṅkoyilkoṇṭānum Āttiraiyan pañcaneti Aṟivāḷapaṭṭanum Āttiraiyan Ulakan kaṇavatipaṭṭanum
Ivanaivomuṅ kaikkoṇṭom Itu panmāyeśurarakṣai§
Digital edition of SII 41.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
